signals.headline: Bitcoin Short Squeeze Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Bitcoin Short Squeeze Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**

A massive short squeeze supported Bitcoin's institutional ETF inflows and price recovery[4]. This technical event provided fuel for broader market gains across altcoins including Solana[4].

signals.headline: Solana's Alpenglow Upgrade Governance Passed with 98
signals.raw:
Solana's Alpenglow Upgrade Governance Passed with 98.27% Approval | YES | HIGH confidence**

The Alpenglow upgrade for 2026, which aims to reduce transaction finality to 100-150 milliseconds, passed governance with overwhelming support[3]. This cements Solana's positioning as one of the fastest execution layers and validates network fundamentals.

signals.headline: XRP Records Largest Weekly Inflows, Leading Bitcoin and Solana | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
XRP Records Largest Weekly Inflows, Leading Bitcoin and Solana | YES | HIGH confidence**

XRP led digital asset inflows with $119.6 million in the week ending April 8—its strongest weekly haul since mid-December 2025—as institutional capital shifted toward the token[4]. This marks a notable sentiment shift favoring XRP over previously dominant assets.

signals.headline: Solana Maintains DEX Volume Leadership for 7th Consecutive Month | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Solana Maintains DEX Volume Leadership for 7th Consecutive Month | YES | MED confidence**

Solana recorded $57 billion in decentralized exchange volume in March 2026, surpassing all Layer 1 and Layer 2 networks including Ethereum[3][5], signaling sustained ecosystem momentum.
